name: No Sugar Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients in a bowl until smooth.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened.
3. Slice the apples into the uncooked pie crust.
4. Pour the mixture over the apples.
5. Cover with the top pie crust.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
7. Optionally, sprinkle one package of Sweet and Low sugar substitute on the apples if desired.
Note: This pie can be made without a crust to save calories. Simply pour the mixture over the apples in a pie pan.
